subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-09-08 in London
subcodes.first_line: This is not a small house – it is the hearts that must be enlarged. When we first arrived in Akka… His Holiness Solomon said, "When I was a child I used to think that happiness was riding a horse or going on an outing.
subcodes.first_line_orig: منزل کوچک نیست باید قلوب وسعت داشته باشد
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment
